Petition For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem.
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Vacated

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeremy Burns (Appearing by Court Call) for Janel Huston, Michael Huston, etc. David Eisenmann (Appearing by Court Call) for Morris Simpson.

The Court noted that the consent for the Guardian Ad Litem was filed on April 29, 2013 and that the petition requests the Mr. Simpson not pay any person any amount in excess of $45,000.00. Furthermore, the Court stated that the language of that request needs to be modified to state that Mr. Simpson is not required to pay the released party any further sum. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement, etc. is granted as modified pursuant to consent of counsel at today's hearing (subject to review of the order) and subject to approval from Mr. Lowe's clients. The Petition for Letters of Administration with will annexed was continued to May 14, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with a dismissal without prejudice of competing petition for probate and objections to be filed by May 10, 2013. The examiner is to be notified of the dismissal being filed at least three days prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement, For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem, And For Appointment Of Special Administrator
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement, For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem, And For Appointment Of Special Administrator
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Eisenmann (appearing by Court Call) for Morris Simpson (Special Administration).

The Court advised Mr. Eisenmann that Petition for an Appointment for Guardian Ad Litem can be done ex parte and that Mr. Loew was advised of the same. The matters can not go forward prior to the appointment of Guardian Ad Litem. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed and Petition for Appproval of Settlement Agreement are continued to April 30, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept 204. Special Letters is extended to April 30, 2013. Mr. Eisenmann is to prepare a form of order. The May 29, 2013 hearing date is vacated.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement, For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem, And For Appointment Of Special Administrator
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Continued To Mar-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: David Eisenmann appeared by Court Call for Morris Simpson. Jeffrey Loew appeared by Court Call for Michael Huston & Janel Huston.

The Court noted that there is a request to continue the Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement to allow time to address the Examiner's notes and to have the Special Letters extended. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement and the Petition for Letters of Administration W/WA are both continued to March 26, 2013 at 10:30am in Dept. 204. Counsel are allowed to appear by Court Call. Mr. Eisenmann to submit order to extend Special Letters to March 26, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Abasse.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Continued To Oct-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Eisenmann for and with Morris Simpson. Jeffrey Loew for Michael Huston and Jenel Huston.

Counsel advised the Court that they are still working on mediation. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed was continued to October 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Loew for Michael Huston and Janel Huston (Objectors/Constestants). David Eisenmann for and with Morris Simpson.

The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 27, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by May 2, 2012. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Michael Huston and Janel Huston was taken off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed filed by Mr. Simpson was continued to and the Parties are to return on May 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To May-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Continued To Feb-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Loew for Michael Huston and Janel Huston (Petitioners/Objectors). David Eisenmann for Morris Simpson (Petitioner).

Discussions on whether there is a need for appointment of a Special Administator were held. The Court advised Counsel that they should consider a Third Party in the event that one is needed. The Petitions for Letters of Adminstration were continued to February 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of Mr. Loew's amendment to his petition addressing the issues raised by the Probate Examiner and for status of discovery.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
